description: Create a new Unit Process in the USLCI database named 'Quicklime Production, stoichiometric' to model the calcination of 1000 kg of Limestone (technosphere flow) into 560 kg of Quicklime (product flow). Calculate and add the required amount of Carbon Dioxide (elementary flow to air) to satisfy the mass balance based on chemical stoichiometry (CaCO3 -> CaO + CO2). Save the calculated CO2 amount to ~/LCA_Results/stoichiometry_check.txt.
